questions.question:
Which of the following SQL query deletes all tuples in the teacher relation for those teachers associated with a department located in the building with name CSE and which is in department relation:



Databases: ISRO CSE 2023 | Question: 28
options:
DELETE FROM teacher
WHERE dept_name IN (
   SELECT dept_name
   FROM department
   WHERE building = ‘CSE);
questions.correct_answer:
DELETE FROM teacher
WHERE dept_name IN (
   SELECT dept_name
   FROM department
   WHERE building = ‘CSE);

questions.question:
Consider the following query :

\( SELECT \) E.eno, \( COUNT(*) \)
\( FROM \) Employees E
\( GROUP\, BY \) E.eno

If an index on \( eno \) is available, the query can be answered by scanning only the index if



Databases: ISRO
options: the index is only hash and clustered
the index is only \( B+ \) tree and clustered
index can be hash or \( B+ \) tree and clustered or non-clustered
index can be hash or \( B+ \) tree and clustered
questions.correct_answer: index can be hash or \( B+ \) tree and clustered or non-clustered
